sub_questions.question_text:
(a) i) Draw the multiplication $\otimes$ table in modulo $9$ on $\{2,3,7,8\}$.
ii) Use the table to find the truth set of $8 \otimes m = 2$

(a) Given that $p = \frac{q - t}{t + 1}$
i) Make $t$ the subject of the relation
ii) Find the value of $t$ when $p = \frac{2}{3}$ and $q = \frac{3}{4}$
(b) Given that $m = \frac{2x}{1 - x^{2}}$, express, in simplest form, $(2m - n)$ in terms of $x$.
(a) In the diagram is a circle $MNPR$ with center $O$. The reflex angle at $O$ is $240^{\circ}$, $\angle NMO = 52^{\circ}$. Find the value of $m$.

(b) A ladder of length $6.5\text{ m}$ leans against a vertical wall. If the top of the ladder is $6.0\text{ m}$ from the ground, calculate, correct to two decimal places, the distance from the wall to the foot of the ladder.
